chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-103 of 2023 Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1.For orders on CMA No.8305/2025 2.For orders on CMA No.8306/2025 3.For orders on CMA No.5564/2025 6th April, 2026. Petitioner Nazeer Ahmed is present in person. Respondent No.1/Abdul Hamed Jessar Chairman Town Committee Dokri District Larkana. >>>>> <<<<< At the very outset, respondent No.1 namely Abdul Hamed Jessar, Chairman Town Committee, Dokri, District Larkana has appeared and under cover of his statement dated 06.04.2026 placed before the Court original Cheque Nos. 56871941 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.06.2026, 56871942 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.07.2026, 56871943 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.08.2026, 56871944 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.09.2026, 56871945 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.10.2026, 56871946 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.11.2026, 56871947 amounting to Rs.130,227/- dated 05.12.2026, 56871948 amounting to Rs.130,232/- dated 01.01.2027 in favour of the petitioner, which have been handed over to the petitioner in Court today, however, photocopies of same are kept on record. The petitioner on receipt of above cheques, being satisfied, seeks disposal of CMA No.5564/2025. Similarly respondent No.1 also seeks disposal of CMA Nos. 8305 & 8306 of 2025. Accordingly the listed applications are disposed of having become infructuous. Judge Head of Const. Benches Aamir/PS Judge
